structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-03-05 Home Start 100 Program Update
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-03-05 16:11:35-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

We are pleased to announce the Home Start 100 program has been enhanced to allow a maximum loan amount of $450,000!

 

Program Highlights

*	First Time Homebuyers only
*	30-year fixed & 5/6 ARM
*	Purchase Transactions only
*	100% LTV
*	700 Fico Score
*	No Mortgage Insurance Required
*	Max Loan amount $450,000
*	Property must be in Pima County
*	Income Limits apply (110% AMI)

 

 

Attachments

*	Updated Marketing Collateral
*	Updated Program Guidelines

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>  
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
